data.body:
## Description

Create tests/skills/test-epic-scrutiny-pipeline.sh with behavioral tests verifying the scrutiny pipeline extraction:

- Test 1: Shared pipeline file exists at plugins/dso/skills/shared/workflows/epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md and is non-empty
- Test 2: Brainstorm SKILL.md does NOT contain inline scrutiny step definitions — verify no 'Step 2.5: Gap Analysis' header remains in brainstorm (negative constraint, acceptable per structural test exemption)
- Test 3: Brainstorm SKILL.md references the shared pipeline path (shared/workflows/epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md)
- Test 4: Shared pipeline contains gap analysis step (grep for 'gap.analysis' case-insensitive)
- Test 5: Shared pipeline contains web research step (grep for 'web.research' case-insensitive)
- Test 6: Shared pipeline contains scenario analysis step (grep for 'scenario.analysis' case-insensitive)
- Test 7: Shared pipeline contains fidelity review step with feasibility trigger (grep for 'fidelity.review' and 'feasibility' case-insensitive)

Add .test-index entry with RED marker.
Tests must FAIL (RED) before implementation.

## File Impact
- CREATE: tests/skills/test-epic-scrutiny-pipeline.sh
- MODIFY: .test-index

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] `ruff check` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/*.py $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/**/*.py
- [ ] `ruff format --check` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/*.py $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/**/*.py
- [ ] 7 test functions added
  Verify: grep -c '^test_' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-epic-scrutiny-pipeline.sh
- [ ] New tests FAIL (RED)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-epic-scrutiny-pipeline.sh 2>&1 | tail -3
